value.headline: FY25 Full-year Sales and Results
value.summary: Consistent organic operating margin expansion, investing in brand desirability and sustainable long-term growth FY25 Organic Net Sales -3.0%, with declines in China, USA and GTR Asia negatively impacting mix, while many markets posted a resilient to strong growth, leading to gain
